name: codepack-lz
description: Pack the current VS Code workspace into a compressed AI context envelope.

codepackLz.binaryPath.description: Path to the CodePack-LZ CLI binary.

codepackLz.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size, in bytes, to include in a pack.

codepackLz.pruneComments.description: Strip common comments from supported text files before packing.
